name: perplexity-web-mcp
description: Connect Claude to Perplexity AI. Search the web with premium models — GPT-5, Claude Sonnet, Gemini, Grok — with real-time data, citations, and quota-aware routing.
long_description:
This extension connects Claude Desktop to Perplexity AI via the Model Context Protocol. It provides 21 tools for web search, deep research, model selection, and in-band authentication.

**Prerequisites:**
1. Install the package: `pip install perplexity-web-mcp-cli` or `uv tool install perplexity-web-mcp-cli`
2. Authenticate: Run `pwm login` to set up your Perplexity account

**Features:**
- Smart query with automatic model/quota routing
- Access to all Perplexity models (GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3, Grok 4.1, etc.)
- Deep Research for comprehensive reports
- Extended thinking mode for complex analysis
- Source focus: web, academic, social, finance
- In-band authentication (no manual token management)

tools.name: pplx_smart_query
tools.description: Quota-aware query — auto-selects best model based on limits

tools.name: pplx_query
tools.description: Query with explicit model selection and thinking toggle

tools.name: pplx_ask
tools.description: Ask a question with real-time web data

tools.name: pplx_deep_research
tools.description: In-depth reports with more sources and reasoning

tools.name: pplx_usage
tools.description: Check remaining rate limits and quotas
